chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Sales Tax Reference Application No 167 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No. 3749/2024. (Condonation) 2. For orders on office objection No. 01 & 09. 3. For orders on CMA No. 3750/24 (Ex) 4. For order on main case. 5. For order on CMA No. 3751/2024 (Stay) 12.12.2025 None present. This reference is pending since 2024 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On the previous date, applicant has remained unrepresented without intimation or justification. Same is the case today. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with this matter, therefore, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 47 subsection 5 of Sales Tax Act, 1990. Judge Judge Ayaz P.S.
